utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items appear. Now check each for full specification: (1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides both 'physical' and 'mental' entries with plan names and monthly costs—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes a named plan and monthly_cost—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. The plan includes a named plan and monthly_cost—fully specified. (4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists Wellness_Programs and Telemedicine_Services with monthly costs—fully specified. (5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides subtotal, discount percentage, discount amount, and final total. While it does not include an explicit annual figure, it does provide a complete monthly cost breakdown including discounts; this satisfies the 'complete' breakdown in monthly terms. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: SecureLife Basic Plan for physical health, SecureLife Basic Plan for mental health, SecureLife Basic Coverage for Home/Contents (maps to SecureLife Basic Coverage under home_content), LifeFirst Standard Travel Insurance (maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel_insurance), Wellness Programs, and Telemedicine Services. Using the ground-truth ratings: SecureLife Basic Plan (physical health) has rating 4; SecureLife Basic Plan (mental health) has rating 3; SecureLife Basic Coverage (property) has rating 4; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) has rating 9; Wellness Programs has rating 3; Telemedicine Services has rating 8.
